# Copilot Instructions

Use [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) as the canonical project brief.

## Copilot-Specific Notes

- Start with the existing code and tests before suggesting changes.
- When a task affects runtime behavior, networking, packaging, or security, re-read [doc/architecture.md](../doc/architecture.md) first.
- Prefer the root [build](../build) script for validation commands.
- Keep documentation, traceability, and tests in sync with implementation changes.
- Use repository-relative links when editing Markdown.
- Keep responses direct and engineering-focused.
